description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named AMR-Wind Intel OneAPI CI that runs on push and pull requests to the development branch when files in cmake, amr-wind, submods, unit_tests, CMakeLists.txt, or .github/workflows/dpcpp-ci.yml change. Use an ubuntu-latest job matrix to test with Intel OneAPI ICC and DPCPP compilers. For each compiler, cancel previous workflow runs, check out the repository with submodules, prepare the DPC++ environment, and configure and build the project with CMake and the respective compiler.
